adjudication_compliance.write_action_guard: 无 write_action 需要保护 — all verify operations

checks.expected: requestMatchers 中 auth 路径仅含 /auth/login 和 /auth/register
checks.detail: 免认证路径精确匹配，/auth/logout 和 /auth/reset-password 已被排除在 permitAll 之外

checks.expected: uri.equals() 精确匹配，无 startsWith("/auth/") 通配
checks.actual: uri.equals("/auth/login") || uri.equals("/auth/register") || uri.startsWith("/public/") || uri.startsWith("/static/") || uri.equals("/error") || uri.equals("/favicon.ico")
checks.detail: JWT 过滤器使用 equals 精确匹配 /auth/login 和 /auth/register，与 SecurityConfig 保持一致，双重保障
logout() 和 resetPassword() 方法无 @AuthenticationPrincipal 依赖，路径精确化后无 NPE 风险

RISK-01_security_config_path_exact.residual_risk: 建议未来添加 SecurityConfigIntegrationTest 覆盖路径白名单变更

checks.expected: 使用 user?.username ?? '' 替代 localStorage.getItem('username')
checks.detail: 通过 optional chaining 防御 user 为 null 的情况

RISK-02_settings_localStorage_unify.residual_risk: 若 AuthProvider 未正确包裹路由则 useAuth 可能失败，可通过路由守卫解决

checks.expected: BigScreenStats interface 已定义，11 个 number 字段
checks.detail: BigScreenStats interface 在 dashboard.types.ts 第271-294行定义，包含 totalAssets, inUseAssets, idleAssets, scrapAssets, utilizationRate, totalValue, netValue, pendingApprovals, pendingWorkOrders, inventoryProgress, criticalAlerts

checks.actual: import type { BigScreenStats } from '@/types/dashboard.types'; const fallbackStats: BigScreenStats = { ... }; type Stats = BigScreenStats;

checks.expected: 已导入 BigScreenStats，fallbackStats 使用显式类型标注
checks.actual: import type { BigScreenStats } from '@/types/dashboard.types'; const fallbackStats: BigScreenStats = { ... }; type Stats = BigScreenStats;

RISK-03_bigscreen_interface_refactor.residual_risk: API 字段变更时需同步更新 BigScreenStats interface
